case_title: SA, SUSAN VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SA, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
